ASBESTOS SETTLEMENT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Continued To Feb-29-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Janice W. Man of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (213-486-8000) appearing for defendants Scott Co. of California and Underground Construction.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Maintaining the Current Trial Date with Preference is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 36(a). The declaration of counsel is sufficient, for purposes of this motion, to establish that the health of John Morris is such that a trial preference is necessary to prevent prejudicing his interest in the litigation. (See Code Civ. Proc., sec 36.5; Fox v. Sup. Ct. (2018) 21 Cal.App.4th 529, 534.)

The February 26, 2024 return holding trial date is vacated. The new trial date is March 4, 2024 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is March 15, 2024. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the initial February 26, 2024 trial date.

Plaintiffs are to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than January 19, 2024. Responses to the demand are due no later than February 2, 2024. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Pang Ly via electronic mail by February 23, 2024 at 12:00 p.m. A mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, February 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/SKF)
